title: Akshaya Private Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Akshaya Private Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
